description: effect-class claim: a call that would modify the gate's own code/config — always destructive, never ACL-loosened, verdict-only
rules: verdict-only: govd decides; Hermes executes its own handler on allow — exod never runs the claimed tool
value-free: TOOL is a name, ARGS_DIGEST a sha256, TARGET a coarse class label — argument values and secrets never cross the wire
destructive perks resolve through push_back -> human approval; 'selfmod' additionally must never be ACL-loosened
usage: Claimed by the Hermes govern_gate for every tool call it classifies as 'selfmod'. Vars: TOOL, ARGS_DIGEST, TARGET.
limitation: Records the claim; enforcement is the govd verdict plus Hermes' own gate chokepoint. This perk cannot observe or stop the tool itself.
